economic_notes: Nation has significant investments in Ditidaht Economic Development Limited Partnership (logging, investments) and Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Limited Partnership. Forestry Consultation and Revenue Sharing Agreement (FCRSA) in place. COVID-19 noted as potential risk to operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Four entities fully consolidated (Operating, Capital, Trust, Negotiation Support Agreement Funds) and four GBEs on modified equity basis (Ditidaht Economic Development LP, Ditidaht Economic Development GP Inc., Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood LP, Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Development Corp). ISC funding flows through Nuu-Chah-Nulth Tribal Council Comprehensive Funding Arrangement and cannot be separately identified from the NTC revenue line. Total government transfers estimated from identifiable government sources: NTC $4,943,510 + BCTC $756,325 + FNESC $591,423 + FNHA $155,000 + Aboriginal Head Start $176,714 + Province of BC $445,205 = $7,068,177 plus FCRSA $344,413 = $7,412,590; however FCRSA and NTC amounts may include non-government components. No schedule of remuneration provided. Prior year had a large Ottawa Trust Fund expense of $3,127,230 and a loan forgiveness of $10,697,335 related to Negotiation Support Agreement Funds making prior year figures not directly comparable. COVID-19 impact noted as potential risk.
